title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Momonosuke, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The plan to stop the Samuel was a failure!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But what about the intelligence you obtained......!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My deepest apologies! In all the years I spent with kin'emon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never imagined him to be so calculating....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're saying the fleet is on its way to onigaShima!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wouldn't worry about that just yet, orochi- same.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fuku- Rokuju!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not a single boat has been sighted at the port.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, three ships that departed have yet to return.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And four pirates have been sighted near the stage...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy and pirate Hunter zero...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Along with Eustass "Captain" Kid and "Murder Machine" Killer.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There is a rather high possibility...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That both parties' crews have landed on the island as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Why hasn't this been reported....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: QUEEN- DONO is handling it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I felt it was not worth spoiling your party over.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Furthermore, nobody on the island has sighted the Samuel in question.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whatever the case my be, our full force is gathered here on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on on onigaashima.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter what happens, you should be completely safe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WORORORORORORO! You heard the man! Drink up, Oroch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Allow me to pour you a drink.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No...!!! I don't want to hear your empty assurances... I want those Samuraidead

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy is here..!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Find some way to survive, momo- suke!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We'll definitely come rescue you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the others aren't here? There are no ships? Kinemon...everyone.. are you okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: BLACK MARIA, HAND THE BOY OVER!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Right... We can't forget... this is the leader of our enemies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Prepare the stage for a cruci- fixion!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will kill the last remnant of the Kozuki clan! Let the curtain fall on their era!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And then, this will all be over! Gufufufufufufu Fuhaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Off the coast of Oniga- Shima...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The cat!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He just got here!? What took him so long!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, we had to climb the waterfall! Goronyanya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Do you realize what today is!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course, it's the day of the plan! The fire festival is tonight!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We cut it close, but it's fine now, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whether or not things are fine depends on you- gara.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're currently on our way to the north- western tip of onigashima.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, gotcha! Well, then, I'll see you later!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No, wait, hold on! Wait!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 43 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
